excerpt: Hi, I just received my first Homey, and this is my first post on this forum. I’m not very technical, but you have to start somewhere so please bear with me. I hope I’m doing this correctly. Could you please add the following device? Device Name: _TZ3000_xr3htd96 Model: TS0201 Thank you very much!
